summary: Iteration 71 - Testing Individual User Delete from Admin Panel and Admin Notifications Sync. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} successfully deletes non-admin users and all related data, (2) DELETE returns 403 when trying to delete admin accounts (both admin@kalmori.com and submitkalmori@gmail.com protected), (3) DELETE returns 404 for non-existent users, (4) Frontend shows Delete button only for non-admin users, (5) Delete confirmation modal shows user details and warning, (6) BOTH admin accounts receive new_signup notifications.
passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} successfully deletes non-admin user
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns 404 for non-existent user
Backend: DELETE cleans up related data (releases, notifications, wallets, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns role field for delete button visibility
Backend: BOTH admins receive new_signup notification after user registration
Backend: POST /api/admin/schedules/check-due sends reminders to ALL admins
Backend: New submission notifications go to ALL admins
Frontend: Admin Users page loads with data-testid='admin-users'
Frontend: Delete buttons appear for non-admin users (data-testid='delete-user-{id}')
Frontend: Admin user rows do NOT have Delete button
Frontend: Modal shows user details and permanent deletion warning
Frontend: User removed from list after deletion
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} endpoint correctly checks user.role == 'admin' and returns 403
Endpoint cleans up 18+ collections including releases, tracks, notifications, wallets, beats, royalty_splits
Frontend AdminUsersPage.jsx correctly conditionally renders Delete button: {u.role !== 'admin' && ...}
Delete confirmation modal has red warning styling and shows user details
send_admin_signup_notification uses find() to get ALL admins (not find_one)
Schedule reminder endpoint notifies ALL admins via find() loop
Submission notification in server.py uses find() to notify ALL admins
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin accounts and created test users via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 verified: (1) Individual user delete endpoint at DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} works correctly - deletes non-admin users and all related data across 18+ collections. (2) Admin accounts are protected - returns 403 for both admin@kalmori.com and submitkalmori@gmail.com. (3) Returns 404 for non-existent users. (4) Frontend shows Delete button only for non-admin users (role !== 'admin' check). (5) Delete confirmation modal has data-testid='delete-user-modal' and confirm button has data-testid='confirm-delete-user-btn'. (6) ALL admin notifications (new_signup, new_submission, schedule_reminder) now sync to BOTH admin accounts via find() instead of find_one().

individual_user_delete.non_admin_user: 200 - Deletes user and all related data

features: Lists data that will be deleted (releases, tracks, beats, messages, analytics, wallet)

admin_notifications_sync.implementation: Uses find() to get ALL admins, then loops to create notification for each
